name: quicken-entry
title: Quicken Entry
description: Quickly enter transactions into Quicken for Mac without leaving your workflow
author: YOUR_RAYCAST_USERNAME

commands.name: add-transaction
commands.title: Add Transaction
commands.subtitle: Quicken
commands.description: Add a transaction to Quicken using a full form

commands.name: quick-expense
commands.title: Quick Expense
commands.subtitle: Quicken
commands.description: Enter a transaction with natural language, e.g. "$45 Starbucks :Food"

preferences.name: defaultAccount
preferences.title: Default Account
preferences.description: Account used for Quick Expense and as the default for Add Transaction

preferences.name: accounts
preferences.title: Accounts
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of your Quicken account names (must match exactly)

preferences.name: categories
preferences.title: Categories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of Quicken categories for the dropdown
preferences.placeholder: Food & Dining, Gas & Fuel, Shopping, Utilities

preferences.name: bringToForeground
preferences.title: Quicken Window
preferences.label: Bring Quicken to the foreground after entering a transaction
preferences.description: When disabled, Quicken stays in the background after the transaction is saved
